content: Piper: Barney, have you noticed how quiet it is around here lately? It's almost eerie. Barney Rook: Yes, Piper. The mirelurks have been relatively quiet these past few weeks. I've been conserving ammunition, just in case. But I can't shake off this feeling that something's about to happen. Piper: Well, maybe it's just the calm before the storm. But I have to say, I've never seen Salem this quiet before. It's almost peaceful. Barney Rook: Peaceful? In Salem? I doubt that'll last long. But I must admit, it's nice to have a break from the constant fighting. Piper: Yeah, it's been a while since we've had some downtime. But I have to say, I'm enjoying the quiet. It's given me a chance to catch up on my work for Publick Occurrences.

Piper: Well, Barney, I think I'll head back to Diamond City for now. I've got a few stories to chase down. But I'll be back soon to check on things. Barney Rook: Take care, Piper. And keep your guard up. You never know when trouble might find you. Piper: Will do, Barney. See you soon. Barney Rook: It's been a while since I've had a visitor. But I'm glad Piper stopped by. She's a breath of fresh air in this quiet town.
